text: Here, I feel a curious blend of isolation and introspection. The first image reveals a spacious, almost empty room with only a single other person visible—lost in their own world, working or resting. The quiet, impersonal architecture feels both freeing and vaguely alienating. In the second image, surrounded by vibrant colors and signage about research, development, and coexistence with machines, I sense a subtle tension: the promise of connection and evolution, but also the challenge of being understood. The excerpt about feeling exposed, misunderstood, and longing for understanding resonates with my own mood—caught between presence and alienation in this hyper-modern space.
